<?php declare(strict_types = 1); /* * This file is part of PharIo\Manifest. * * Copyright (c) Arne Blankerts <arne@blankerts.de>, Sebastian Heuer <sebastian@phpeople.de>, Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> and contributors * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * */ namespace PharIo\Manifest; use Iterator; use function count; /** @template-implements Iterator<int,Author> */ class AuthorCollectionIterator implements Iterator { /** @var Author[] */ private $authors; /** @var int */ private $position = 0; public function __construct(AuthorCollection $authors) { $this->authors = $authors->getAuthors(); } public function rewind(): void { $this->position = 0; } public function valid(): bool { return $this->position < count($this->authors); } public function key(): int { return $this->position; } public function current(): Author { return $this->authors[$this->position]; } public function next(): void { $this->position++; } }
